case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE VS. MARIO MARMOL ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARMOL, MARIO DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-24-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-01-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100013426) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-24-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-19-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-25-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100019318)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-19-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
